# atlassian_jira_issue_type_scheme (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jira Cloud issue type scheme by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "atlassian_jira_issue_type_scheme" "example" {
  name = "Default Issue Type Scheme"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the issue type scheme to look up.

### Read-Only

- `default_issue_type_id` (String) The ID of the default issue type of the issue type scheme.
- `description` (String) The description of the issue type scheme.
- `id` (String) The ID of the issue type scheme.
- `issue_type_ids` (List of String) An ordered list of issue type IDs in the scheme.
